title: Group by Date Column to be Customizable
excerpt:

posts.author: jaclynvogel (jaclyn vogel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently the “group by date” feature is limited to only grouping with default settings. I would like to be able to customize this to a time period such as month, quarter, year, etc. E.g. if I have tasks due during different months it will allow me to specify that I want the groups based on month or iif I want them set by quarter, etc.

What are you trying to achieve

Better sorting options that are not based on automation but just the information inputted by users.
